title: Peaky Blinders: Uncovering the truth behind Tommy Shelby’s empire; what’s real and what’s fiction?
summary_full: Peaky Blinders blends real history with fiction, drawing inspiration from Birmingham's street gangs and figures like Billy Kimber and Oswald Mosley. While the Shelby family is fictional, the show incorporates real elements of early 20th-century crime and political tensions. However, its portrayal of a vast, sophisticated criminal empire departs significantly from the more localized, fragmented reality of the original Peaky Blinders.
